message:
🌱 Add oauth2-proxy: Add an id_token_hint parameter to the logout provider URL mission (#1512)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oauth2-proxy-884-add-an-id-token-hint-parameter-to-the-logout-provider-url-for-o",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oauth2-proxy: Add an id_token_hint parameter to the logout provider URL for OIDC provider",
+    "description": "Add an id_token_hint parameter to the logout provider URL for OIDC provider. Requested by 21+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oauth2-proxy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oauth2-proxy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nhelm list -n oauth2-proxy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oauth2-proxy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oauth2-proxy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oauth2-proxy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get configmap -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oauth2-proxy\n```\nComply with the specified recommendations on https://openid.net/specs/openid-connect-rpinitiated-1_0.html#RPLogout\nOkta example: https://developer.okta.com/docs/reference/api/oidc/#logout"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add an id_token_hint parameter to the logout provider URL…",
+        "description": "Reading through this, I think we need to have a wider discussion about single sign out, it's not something we have intended to support in the past but we could possibly start doing so.\n\nIIRC OIDC providers can provide a sign out URL as part of their well known endpoint. We should enable the OIDC\n```yaml\nApplication: Web\nDomain: dev-1234.okta.com\nGrant Types: Auhtorization Code, Refresh Token\nLogin redirect URIs: https://myapp.com/oauth2/callback\t\nLogout redirect URIs: https://myapp.com/oauth2/sign_in\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get events -n oauth2-proxy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add an id_token_hint parameter to the logout provider URL…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Reading through this, I think we need to have a wider discussion about single sign out, it's not something we have intended to support in the past but we could possibly start doing so.\n\nIIRC OIDC providers can provide a sign out URL as part of their well known endpoint. We should enable the OIDC provider to leverage this when we are signing people out of OAuth2 Proxy.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Application: Web\nDomain: dev-1234.okta.com\nGrant Types: Auhtorization Code, Refresh Token\nLogin redirect URIs: https://myapp.com/oauth2/callback\t\nLogout redirect URIs: https://myapp.com/oauth2/sign_in",
+        "https://myapp.com/oauth2/sign_out?rd=https%3A%2F%2Fdev-1234.okta.com%2Foauth2%2Fdefault%2Fv1%2Flogout"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oauth2-proxy",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "oauth2-proxy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/issues/884",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy"
+    },
+    "reactions": 21,
+    "comments": 71,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with oauth2-proxy installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-19T06:41:58.714Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
